scripts.check:scripts: sh -n install.sh && bun test scripts/release-version.test.ts scripts/desktop-update-manifest.test.ts scripts/desktop-release-workflow.test.ts scripts/desktop-pairing-smoke.test.ts scripts/install.test.ts scripts/check-aggregate.test.ts && bunx tsc --project scripts/tsconfig.json
scripts.check:cli: cd cli && bun test && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:web: cd web && bun test && bunx tsc --noEmit && bunx vite build
scripts.check:worker: cd worker && bun run verify:test-runtime && bunx vitest run && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check: bun run check:scripts && bun run check:cli && bun run check:shared && bun run check:web && bun run check:worker
scripts.release:verify: bun run check && cd worker && bun run verify:remote-schema
scripts.release:deploy: bun run check && cd worker && bun run deploy && bun run verify:remote-schema
